demo.title: phylax-audit.sh
demo.code:
# Audit a skill before install (CLI — exit 0=ALLOW, 1=WARN, 2=DENY)
npx phylax@0.2.2 --skill ./SKILL.md

# Hosted API (same engine, SSRF-hardened)
curl -sS -X POST https://usephylax.com/api/audit \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"skill_source":"github.com/owner/repo/SKILL.md","mode":"fast"}' | jq .

# Embeddable verdict badge
# https://usephylax.com/api/badge?skill=owner/repo

setup: Or call the hosted API: `POST https://usephylax.com/api/audit` — no API key required
Use `fast` for CI; use `deep` when the skill references live token contracts (honeypot simulation on Base)
Also available as a native Aeon skill: `./add-skill aaronjmars/aeon phylax-audit`
